title: pyrus schizomeles
intro: Pyrus schizomeles, also known as the Chinese wild pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The medicinal properties of Pyrus schizomeles lie in its bark, which contains a compound called pyrusin, a flavonoid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pyrus schizomeles are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, Pyrus schizomeles is prepared as a tea or a decoction by infusing the bark in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the bark in a solvent.
